property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Gather Evidence — Response: After you use a basic power, place 1 evidence counter on Alias Investigations.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "These things rarely end well."

alternate.name: Jessica Jones
alternate.property: Incognito Mode — Action: Change to hero form. You cannot change back to alter-ego form this phase. Setup: Put the Alias Investigations support into play.

card.name: Alias Investigations
card.property: Permanent. Response: After a side scheme is defeated, exhaust this card → place 2 evidence counters here. Then, you may remove evidence counters from here equal to the villain's remaining hit points to defeat the villain's current stage.

card.name: Luke Cage
card.property: Toughness. Action: Exhaust Luke Cage and deal 1 damage to him → give him a tough status card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "He may have skin like steel, but he's got a heart of gold." -Jessica Jones

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. You may remove 1 evidence counter from Alias Investigations to deal 2 additional damage and for this attack to gain either overkill or piercing.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "You messed with the wrong lady." -Jessica Jones

property.name: Text
property.value: Response: After an evidence counter is placed on Alias Investigations, ready your identity. Shuffle this card into your deck.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Tell me more." -Jessica Jones

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme and place 2 evidence counters on Alias Investigations. Discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is a minion or side scheme, reveal it.

card.name: Piecing It All Together
card.property: This scheme does not count against the player side scheme limit. When Defeated: The defeating player draws 3 cards.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Sometimes, you take a step back to look at the big picture and it all falls into place.

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action: Remove 2 evidence counters from Alias Investigations and exhaust Calling in Favors → search your deck for an ally and play it as if it were in your hand, reducing its resource cost by 2. (Shuffle.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust this card and choose a non-[[ELITE ]]minion. Remove X evidence counters from Alias Investigations, where X is equal to 2 less than that minion's remaining hit points → discard that minion.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "...gotcha." -Jessica Jones

property.name: Text
property.value: Response: After an enemy is defeated, exhaust Circumstantial Evidence → place 1 evidence counter on Alias Investigations.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Nice find! That'll come in handy." -Daredevil

card.name: Leather Jacket
card.property: Jessica Jones gets +2 DEF. Response: After you defend, place 1 evidence counter on Alias Investigations.

property.name: Quote
property.value: “Luke, does she own any jackets that aren't black leather?” -Iron Fist

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response (attack): After the villain activates against a player, if you are in alter-ego form, change to hero form. Deal 5 damage to the villain and each minion engaged with that player. Discard this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "What did you just say to her?" -Jessica Jones

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Aerial. Preparation.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take at least 3 damage from an attack, discard this card → prevent all of that attack's damage. Take 1 damage.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I think I'm gonna puke." -Jessica Jones

card.name: Stakeout
card.property: Action: If this card is in your play area, attach it to a non-permanent encounter side scheme. Interrupt: When a character thwarts attached scheme, that thwart removes 2 additional threat. If that thwart defeats attached scheme, place 2 evidence counters on Alias Investigations.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Aerial. Avenger.

property.name: Text
property.value: Response: After Captain Marvel enters play, discard the top 4 cards of your deck. If you discard a printed [energy] resource, remove 2 threat from a scheme. If you discard more than one printed [energy] resource, also confuse an enemy.

card.name: Squirrel Girl
card.property: Response: After you play Squirrel Girl from your hand, place 1 squirrel counter here for each card in your hand (to a maximum of 4). Action: Remove 1 squirrel counter from here → remove 1 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Strategy Session

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Tactic. Thwart.

card.property: Alter-Ego Action: Choose a player to search their deck for a player side scheme and add it to their hand. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a player side scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Okay, gang, I've got a plan."-Nova

card.name: Run Them To Ground
card.property: When Defeated: Resolve each of the following: • Skip the next villain phase. • Deal each player 1 facedown encounter card (immediately). • The villain cannot take damage until the start of the next (unskipped) villain phase.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Victory 0.

card.name: Grapnel Launcher
card.property: Restricted. Hero Action: Discard this card → make a basic thwart without exhausting (even if you are exhausted). For this thwart, your hero gets +1 THW and ignores the patrol keyword and any [crisis] icons in play.

card.name: Entrapment
card.property: Max 1 per player. Alter-Ego Response (attack): After the villain schemes, change to hero form and discard this card → deal damage to the villain equal to the amount of threat placed by that activation.

card.name: Joys Of Life
card.property: Alliance. Action: Choose: • Exhaust a [[CIVILIAN ]] alter-ego → ready a hero or ally. • Exhaust a hero or ally → ready a [[CIVILIAN ] alter-ego.

card.name: Unbreakable Bond
card.property: Team-Up (Jessica Jones and Luke Cage). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. Heal a total of 3 damage from among Jessica Jones and Luke Cage.

card.name: Defend Our City
card.property: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Prerequisite ([[DEFENDER]]). Victory 0. When Defeated: Each player may search their deck and discard pile for a Team-Up card and add it to their hand. Until the end of the phase, reduce the cost to play each Team-Up card by 1.
